About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard TYRA dominates today's ranking at #1 with a composite score of 97.3, driven by exceptional returns across all timeframes—notably 254.91% over one year and 72.32% over three months—while maintaining perfect SMA positioning above all key moving averages and perfect ratio consistency (5/5 passes). The stock shows remarkable resilience, outperforming SPY by 236.92% annually and maintaining a strong bad_spy_score of 1.51, indicating it holds gains even during market downturns. LINC ranks second with similar three-month and one-month returns (73.38% and 31.43%) but trails significantly in longer-term performance, posting only 160.7% one-year return versus TYRA's 254.91%, and shows weaker bad_spy_score of 2.49, suggesting less downside protection. Both securities pass all technical gates and display clean momentum signals with normal volatility, but TYRA's superior year-long trajectory and market-relative outperformance distinguish it as the standout momentum candidate in today's 700+ ticker universe.
